rulings.Case Title: RALPH MENDELSON ET AL VS. ROGER FORBES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause To Defendants Roger Forbes And Anne Forbes Re: Preliminary Injunction (Opposition By 4/13; Reply By 4/19)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 7, 2018, Line 2. Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause To Defendants Roger Forbes And Anne Forbes Re: Preliminary Injunction. DENIED. Moving party failed to show irreparable harm that cannot be compensated by money damages. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOPHIA CHEN VS. STEVE SVIENTY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Further Responses To Defendant'S Form Interrogatory 17.1, Set One, And For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 7, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANT STEVE SVIENTY'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Further Responses To Defendant'S Form Interrogatory 17.1, Set One, And For Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED. Plaintiff to provide complete responses. If responses reference documents, such documents to be identified by bate number. Further responses to be delivered to Defendant's counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,200. =(501/REQ)
